pitch_points.claim: CUCET examination can help in getting scholarships up to 100%.

pitch_points.translation: Because their scholarship process is based on JEE mains, but in CUCET you can get scholarships up to 100%.

pitch_points.claim: Early admission increases chances of getting scholarships.
pitch_points.counsellor_quote_hindi: Kyunki baad mein karte hain to fir competition badhta hai aur aapka JEE percentile abhi aaya hai to CUCET examination doge to usse jaldi jitna jaldi doge score jitna aayega to usme scholarship thoda easily mil jayega.
pitch_points.translation: Because if you apply later, the competition increases and your JEE percentile has just come, so if you give the CUCET examination early, the sooner you give it, the better score you will get, and you will get the scholarship more easily.
